questionHtml: Compare the general patterns of activation in the brain shown when all of the individuals in the study processed language.
markschemeHtml:
a. all «deaf and hearing» people show common pattern of brain activation/engage similar tissues ✔

b. all show two distinct areas, one in frontal/anterior region and another in back/posterior region ✔

meta.title: Compare the general patterns of activation in the brain shown when all of the individuals in the study processed language.
